op.text: Sam negotiated remote work from Portland with the Austin robotics startup; he accepted the role with arrangement to work remotely and visit Austin one week every couple months; starts June 2025; Dana and Sam are staying in Portland; Dana described feeling relief at not having to leave 'the load-bearing geography' this year

Sam accepted the Perception team lead role at the Austin robotics startup with a remote work arrangement from Portland; starts June 2025; will visit Austin approximately one week every couple months; Dana described the negotiation as 'he gave something up too — the in-person team, the new city adventure' and said she believes the trade is good for him 'about eighty-five percent'
Decision on Sam's Austin job offer resolved as of early May 2025; Sam negotiated remote work arrangement and Dana and Sam are staying in Portland

[2025-05-11] When Sam told Dana the Austin startup had agreed to remote work, Dana cried a little. She said: 'I hadn't let myself feel how scared I was of leaving this year — the barn, the boat, Beacon Rock, all of it. And I'd been quietly rehearsing how to be graceful about going. Not needing the rehearsal anymore was the relief.'

Sprained ankle badly on Saturday 2025-04-13 during mile nine of a trail run in Forest Park (wet root); diagnosed as bad grade-two sprain; wore walking boot until Thursday 2025-05-01; as of 2025-05-11, out of boot, in physical therapy twice a week, walking normally-ish
Restoring mom's sailboat (the Dorothy Jean) at a barn near Scappoose; working slowly with no deadline; as of 2025-05-11, starboard side is sanded and has started re-caulking the hull seams

op.note: As of 2025-05-11, Dana still has not visited Denver to meet niece Nina (now two months old); Dana said this 'is starting to itch at me' — suggests growing urgency but no concrete plan yet
